case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. LAURA MAE ALPERT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF FRANK P AGNOST JR RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 57253786) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION
